title: FormatUInt16 — packs into 2 bytes
description: JSON + binary (de)serialization of FormatUInt16 (number branded {integer:true; min:0; max:65535}); the [0,65535] bounds select a 2-byte unsigned binary encoding while JSON writes the plain number.
notes: Format-aware binary width: the unsigned 16-bit bounds fix each value at 2 bytes (getBinaryByteSizes [2,2,2]); JSON is lossless plain-number text.
